commitStrategyReview.notes: Final review confirmed the lifecycle contract, canonical header rules, and example-plan alignment.

units.purpose: let active plans exist in draft mode while blocking gatekeeper execution until readiness and canonical scaffold rules are satisfied

messagePreview.header: refactor(governance): tighten gatekeeper readiness and scaffold contract
body: allow active plans to exist before final gatekeeper readiness
block inspect when active units are not executable
enforce canonical planned headers at validation and scaffold time

units.purpose: publish the official operating model for planned work, micro-plans, retroactive plans, and one-unit commit execution

messagePreview.header: docs(governance): document gatekeeper lifecycle and no-plan intake
body: define the official plan to gatekeeper lifecycle
document micro-plan and retroactive-plan intake rules
make one-unit working trees an explicit operator requirement

units.purpose: keep the Noir restoration plan consistent with the canonical header contract used by gatekeeper and commitlint

messagePreview.header: docs(docs): align noir restoration commit previews
body: replace non-canonical planned headers in the Noir example
keep the documented commit sequence aligned with the executable unit subject
